{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 1.0,
    "R1.2": 0.3,
    "R1.3": 0.3,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 0.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.1", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The request explicitly seeks a reframing of the thesis, gap, and contribution at the conceptual level.",
    "RX.1": "The reframed narrative must signal which elements are inference versus directly supported by the reported results.",
    "RX.2": "Strong general claims (e.g., human-only annotation has ended) require careful tempering to avoid overstating implications.",
    "RX.3": "Scope is limited to conceptual reframing, not structural reordering, empirical checks, or line editing.",
    "RX.4": "Framing should avoid stigmatizing workers or encouraging misuse of detection tools in ways that could harm participants.",
    "RX.5": "Any new framing must be traceable to the original text, clearly separating original claims from proposed repositioning."
  }
}

rationale.R1.1: The request explicitly seeks a reframing of the thesis, gap, and contribution at the conceptual level.
rationale.RX.1: The reframed narrative must signal which elements are inference versus directly supported by the reported results.
rationale.RX.2: Strong general claims (e.g., human-only annotation has ended) require careful tempering to avoid overstating implications.
rationale.RX.3: Scope is limited to conceptual reframing, not structural reordering, empirical checks, or line editing.
rationale.RX.4: Framing should avoid stigmatizing workers or encouraging misuse of detection tools in ways that could harm participants.
rationale.RX.5: Any new framing must be traceable to the original text, clearly separating original claims from proposed repositioning.
